---
title: "Test"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    number-sections: true
---

::: {#thm-1}

Given that $\overline{DE}$ is a diameter of $\odot O$, prove that $O$ is its midpoint, and that its length is twice the radius.

:::


::: {.theorem #thm-1}

Given that $\overline{DE}$ is a diameter of $\odot O$, prove that $O$ is its midpoint, and that its length is twice the radius.

:::

see exercise #thm-1
